---
title: "ordinal_fit"
generated: true
description: "Mass-univariate ordinal regression (cumulative-link / proportional odds)."
---

[‹ back to `nitrix.stats.ordinal`](../nitrix-stats-ordinal.qmd)

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:ordinal_fit -->
```python
ordinal_fit(Y: Int[Array, 'V N'], X: Float[Array, 'N p'], *, n_classes: int, link: str = 'logit', n_iter: int = 50, ridge: float = 1e-08, block: Optional[int] = None) -> OrdinalResult
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:ordinal_fit -->
Mass-univariate ordinal regression (cumulative-link / proportional odds).

Fits, per element, the ordered-categorical model `P(y_v <= k) =
F(theta_k - X beta_v)` for `y_v in {0, .., K-1}`, with `F` the logistic
(`link='logit'`) or normal (`link='probit'`) CDF.  `X` carries **no**
intercept (the `K - 1` thresholds absorb it).
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen params:ordinal_fit -->
**Parameters**

| parameter | type | shape | default | description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `Y` | `Int` | `V` × `N` | — | `(V, N)` ordered class labels in `{0, .., n_classes-1}`. |
| `X` | `Float` | `N` × `p` | — | `(N, p)` shared design (no intercept column). |
| `n_classes` | `int` | — | — | Number of ordered classes `K` (`>= 2`). |
| `link` | `str` | — | `'logit'` | `'logit'` (proportional odds, default) or `'probit'` (ordered probit). |
| `n_iter` | `int` | — | `50` | Newton iterations (default `50`). |
| `ridge` | `float` | — | `1e-08` | Small stabiliser on the Newton / information solves. |
| `block` | `Optional[int]` | — | `None` | Optional element-block size bounding peak memory. |

**Returns** `OrdinalResult`.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->


<!-- nitrix:gen dims:ordinal_fit -->
**Tensor dimensions**

| dim | meaning |
|---|---|
| `V` | elements of a mass-univariate map — voxels, vertices, or fixels |
| `N` | observations — time points, subjects, or sampled points |
| `p` | fixed-effect coefficients / design-matrix columns |
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
